creator: intron@intron.ac
text:
I'm the maintainer of the port x11-fonts/wqy. Please update this port.

Complete files:
    http://ftp.intron.ac/tmp/wqy-20081102.tar.bz2
Patch file:
    http://ftp.intron.ac/tmp/wqy-20081102.diff

Comments:

1. Bump version of the Chinese bitmap font to 0.9.9.
2. Import the Unicode bitmap font "Unibit".
3. Import the TrueType font "Zenhei".
